source_metadata.description:
Petition of Melinda McGregor: Councils need clear guidelines of required actions following a dog attack

Submitters:
Melinda McGregor
Dept of Internal Affairs (Dog Control)

Anthea Oliver, Manager, Operational Policy
Karam Talwar, Policy Analyst

NZ Veterinary Association

Becky Murphy, President, Companion Animal Veterinarians Branch

SPCA

Dr Alison Vaughan, Scientific Officer
